title: vicia rerayensis
side_effects: Vicia rerayensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea and dizziness in large quantities. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extracts can also lead to kidney damage and increased heart rate. Furthermore, improper preparation or combination with other medications may cause allergic reactions, such as hives and itching. In extreme cases, misuse of Vicia rerayensis can result in respiratory failure or even coma.
